description_long: This is a single brown leather dress shoe with a medium-height stacked wooden heel and a closed, slip-on design. The upper is smooth with subtle stitched detailing along the edges and a slightly rounded toe. The shoe features a seamless vamp and a low-cut collar, providing a classic and formal appearance. The heel is block-shaped and made of layered wood, giving it a sturdy and elegant look. There is a small metallic or embroidered brand detail on the outer side near the collar. The overall finish is glossy, indicating a polished leather surface in excellent condition.
description: A brown leather slip-on dress shoe with a medium wooden heel, smooth glossy finish, and subtle stitched details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, wooden heel, and a small brand detail near the collar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe and seamless vamp with visible stitching.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth leather upper and the block wooden heel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stacked wooden heel and the back seam of the shoe.
